quoteLast: ; or      take car from Hotel to meet the 8.15 a.m. Steamer at Killaloe for      Portumna, return by down Steamer to Killaloe, thence by 6.10 p.m.      Train for Castleconnell.
title:
The Sunny Side of Ireland
How to see it by the Great Southern and Western Railway
author: O'Mahony, John, 1816-1877; Praeger, R. Lloyd (Robert Lloyd), 1865-1953 [Contributor]
